name: Amgen
shortDescription: Took 20.5% stake in BeiGene for $2.7B (2019) plus joint development of 20 oncology assets

name: Merck & Co.
shortDescription: Multi-billion ADC partnership with Kelun; PD-1/VEGF bispecific deal with LaNova for $3.3B (2024)

name: Eli Lilly

name: AstraZeneca

name: BioNTech
shortDescription: ADC-focused China deals: Duality Biologics 2023 ($1.5B+); Fosun mRNA partnership for COVID

name: Pfizer
shortDescription: CStone Pharmaceuticals partnership for ex-China sugemalimab development
